title: 菊花賞の後に・着陸予定、イマダナシ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun has won the Kikuka Sho with
ease. A reporter named Otonashi comes to
interview her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During the interview, Mayano Top Gun talks
about Narita Brian.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Otonashi follows up by asking if she is planning
on racing in the Arima Kinen, the next race Narita
Brian will compete in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun replies that she will race there if
it means competing directly against Narita Brian.
